ResearchProjectDef.label: dreg
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce toxic chemical derivatives made from corpse-bile that has been vaporized, crystallized, and crushed into small shards.

ResearchProjectDef.label: shiver
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce a volatile and noxious blend of industrial chemicals boiled down into a solid glass-like sheet and then crushed into small shards.
